failedAssertions.reason: Cannot fully test without real E2B/Daytona sandbox executing tasks. CLI framework correctly created thread, initiated workflow, polled with cron, and tracked state - all framework contracts verified. Missing actual sandbox execution to reach terminal state.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated VAL-CLI-002, VAL-CLI-003, VAL-CLI-008 to passed status

summary: Round 2 user testing validation for validation-framework-repair milestone: 3 of 4 previously failed/blocked assertions now pass. TypeScript errors in cli-router.ts have been fixed (VAL-CLI-002, VAL-CLI-003). Real e2e timeout path now works correctly with fixture-based test data (VAL-CLI-008). VAL-CLI-010 remains failed because full e2e success requires a real sandbox (E2B/Daytona) to execute tasks - the CLI framework itself is verified correct.
